summary: The user inquired about exchanging currency for Japanese yen and sought information on customs declarations upon returning to the US. They also asked for transportation options from Shibuya to Narita Airport and decided to reserve a seat on the Narita Express train for their journey.
facts: The user checked out of their Airbnb and headed to the airport for their return flight on the same day. The user plans to take the Narita Express train from Shibuya to Narita Airport. The user intends to reserve their seat on the Narita Express online. The Narita Express train has power outlets available in both Ordinary and Green Cars, compatible with Type A plugs. The user is aware they need to declare items on the US Customs and Border Protection Declaration Form 6059B upon returning to the US. The user is a US citizen entitled to a duty-free exemption on goods valued up to $800. The user is advised to keep receipts and documentation for items they declare at customs. The user is traveling from Shibuya to Narita Airport, which takes approximately 60 minutes on the Narita Express.
